# Overlay Scorecard

Score each candidate overlay from 1–5.

| Dimension | Question |
|---|---|
| Semantic clarity | Does the overlay express the intended idea? |
| Compression quality | Did it remove filler without losing necessary context? |
| Operator strength | Are logical operators visible where needed? |
| Anchor discipline | Are highlights sparse and meaningful? |
| Placement safety | Does it avoid eyes, mouth, hands, product, action, UI, and captions? |
| Visual-load fit | Is word count appropriate for frame complexity? |
| Timing | Does the caption land on the semantic beat? |
| Muted comprehension | Does the viewer understand the gist without sound? |
| Accessibility | Are full captions still available? |
| Memory value | Does the overlay produce a recallable phrase? |
| Ethical retention | Does it clarify rather than confuse? |

Minimum publish standard:

- average score ≥ 4;
- no score below 3;
- accessibility score must pass;
- no known critical obstruction.
